chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT HYDERABAD C.P.NO.D-2226 of 2018 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) 1. For orders on office objection. 2. For hearing of main case. 27.02.2019. Mr. Wahid Bux Aajiz Leghari, Advocate for petitioners. Mr. Muhammad Ismail Bhutto, Additional A.G = Through this petition, the petitioners seek direction to the official respondents to act in accordance with law and provide protection as they have entered into wedlock on account of their freewill and consent. Learned A.A.G files comments on behalf of the respondents No.2 and 3, wherein they have denied the allegations levelled against them by the petitioners. However, the learned A.A.G undertakes that the official respondents shall remain impartial in the matter and shall provide due protection as per law. Learned Counsel for the petitioners in view of the undertaking given by the learned A.A.G is satisfied and seeks disposal of this petition. Accordingly, this petition is disposed of with direction to the official respondents to act strictly in accordance with law and shall ensure that due protection as per law is provided to the petitioners as and when approached by them. JUDGE JUDGE Shahid
